label: Quick Access landing — friendlier, more on-brand
items: Your mobile Quick Access screen now greets you by name ("Good morning, Vinny") with a time-of-day-aware welcome, and the whole layout sits comfortably in the centre of the screen rather than crammed at the top.

Each of the three quick actions now has its own theme-aware colour accent — deep forest green for Visual Lens, peachy warmth for Today, soft container green for Quick Capture — so you can pick the one you want at a glance.
Subtle decorative touches throughout: soft gradient behind the hero, a faded sprout motif, layered card shadows, and a deliberate 'Open full dashboard' pill at the bottom instead of a hidden link.

label: Behind the scenes
items: Strictly within the existing Rhozly theme palette — no new colours invented. The redesign reuses the unused tertiary peach and container green tokens that were sitting in the design system already.
Tile component now accepts a typed `accent` prop so other Quick Access screens can use the same per-action colour treatment in the future.
